74315.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 05/2026
74315.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

74311.subject: 📉 Markets continue crash as Iran war heats up
74311.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $60,971 (-2.9%) | **ETH** $1,617 (-3.7%) | **SOL** $63 (-4.1%)

* US launches [retaliatory self-defense strikes](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064606372814299437?s=20) after Iran downs an Apache helicopter. Trump close to [ordering strikes](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2064670248670826688?s=20) against Iranian infrastructure

* Claude releases [Fable 5](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2064394146916229443?s=20), a Mythos class model

* CPI [report this morning](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2064670308242489646?s=20) is expected to show 4.2% inflation

* CME group releases [crypto index futures](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064554234411205007?s=20)

* Reuters investigation shows Trump family has [profited $2.3B](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2064332312888668551?s=20) from crypto

* Bitcoin ETFs record third straight day of [outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064617794524856708?s=20)

* The [“Hindenberg Omen”](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2064562962161881483?s=20) which predicts market crashes has triggered for the third consecutive day

* Tim Draper believes quantum will [crack banks before Bitcoin](https://x.com/TimDraper/status/2064376983992283213?s=20)

* Bitcoin supply currently at a loss [crosses 50%](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2064442490451628456?s=20)

* Near protocol announces Hyperliquid [perps are live](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2064354710727885038?s=20) on their platform — SpaceX pre-market open interest [crosses $100M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2064348329148870978?s=20) on Hyperliquid

* Kalshi perps trading surpasses [$1B in volume](https://x.com/tokens/status/2064472042091745725?s=20)

* Botanix Bitcoin L2 announces [shutdown](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064642852290986403?s=20)

* Ansem publicly shorts ETH giving a [price target of 0](https://x.com/blknoiz06/status/2064481631642042788?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/markets-continue-crash-as-iran-war-heats-up

Fear and Greed is at
14
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is near
$61K,
recovering from a cycle low last Friday after US jobs data came
in more than double the expected figure, repricing rate cut
expectations overnight. ETH printed an intraday low near $1,507,
its weakest in over a year.

The macro shock triggered the selling. But regulation,
institutional deals, and new infrastructure kept moving
regardless. The UK just proposed letting retail funds hold
crypto. A $480 billion asset manager just entered DeFi. And
Starknet launched on-chain privacy for Bitcoin.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The UK Just Proposed Letting Retail Funds Hold Crypto

The FCA proposed on June 9 that UK retail investment funds be
allowed to hold up to 10% of assets in crypto ETNs, applying to
two major fund structures pooling retail capital.

The FCA only lifted its retail crypto ETP ban in October 2025.
This extends that framework to collective funds.

What concern did the FCA say the proposed limit is intended to
address?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/EoM4vnyE79pzK1Snsm42zg~~/AAQRxRA~/im6jFi2la_GGmO5nMul60-PpPUuhIwJ_0ogWzK0evIFdd_wBDjTdtBOLrOxWy0oeU34OTtUxcDGH48o6-hAxkAyXQH8zDsmde1RGnkDeShHxwz5Xxw3qf75COURspYOYEXHTLKecyt5uHb4rhtU3LmltNoD8_2oKCq5m3REhCAxzfoOQ2mrmJZO9SqEhtpDzCqzI0DAsz3qdl1NuhBPrHxOaSw0mVAojrjHl0EQr3VpNnd_vzOx4SYe_2fdYja77 )
   Over Sixty Founders Are Pushing to Shape
